name: Sky Broadband
notes:
Our UK and Republic of Ireland networks operate under the same ASN (AS5607). However, each region advertises a distinct set of prefixes, with no overlap between the two.

Authentication Method - TCP-AO (Preferred) / MD5.

TTL-Security Preferred for BGP sessions.

Peers who advertise IPv6 prefixes preferred. 

The IPv4 Prefixes and IPv6 Prefixes fields in this PeeringDB record are suggested max values for peers to set on sessions with AS5607.
